content.en:
Bang!!!!

The Jade Dao Ancestor burst out with all his strength, and the entire sect instantly turned into powder, and the surrounding time and space continued to collapse.

However, he still hasn't broken the blockade of the Bastard.

"The peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, this guy is really the Jade Dao Ancestor!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor was shocked.

He had just seen the first face of the Jade Dao Ancestor, but he still didn't recognize it, only when the Jade Dao Ancestor made a move, he could be sure that this was the Jade Dao Ancestor.

"This hidden ability is too terrifying, I can't recognize him when I see him face to face, and the Jade Dao Ancestor is still hiding here, building a sect, how can the Endless Dao Ancestor recognize it?"

Although Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor was shocked, he still killed the Jade Dao Ancestor first.

After all, once he killed the Jade Dao Ancestor, he could get 300 points from Ye Tian from the Nine-Story Building!

For these peripheral members, they have no status, and there are too few tasks that can be taken, and most of the tasks are not allowed to be accepted.

In general, you can only accept assigned tasks.

For example, he guarded the No. 3 Ancient Nest at the boundary of the Hanhai District, guarded the Ancient River of Life, and only gained 50 points for endless years!

And digging out Ye Tian, an official member, was rewarded with 100 points, but that's all.

If you get 300 points at once this time, it's a bloody earning! And it's effortless, time-consuming, and very easy.

"Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, let me go, I'm willing to pay the price!"

Jade Dao Ancestor begged for mercy.

He is only the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, while the Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor is a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and the difference in strength between them is too big!

"Jade Dao Ancestor, you assassinated the official members of the Nine Towers, and also robbed one of the treasures of the Nine Towers, it is impossible for the Nine Towers to let you go, if I let you go, the Nine Towers will definitely punish me, so you better die!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor didn't leave any hands, and directly killed Jade Dao Ancestor with one move.

At this time, Ye Tian also came over.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, Jade Dao Ancestor has been killed!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestral Road.

"Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, the resource treasures on the Jade Dao Ancestor, let's divide them equally!"

Ye Tian proposed.

This is also an agreement agreed before, although Ye Tian didn't make a move, if he didn't find the Jade Dao Ancestor, Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor naturally had no way to kill the Jade Dao Ancestor.

"Good!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor didn't have any opinions, and quickly divided the remaining resources and treasures on Jade Dao Ancestor's body with Ye Tian.

However.

"Jade Dao Ancestor is too poor!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor said: "Jade Dao Ancestor is the peak powerhouse of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and he also has a lot of needs for resources, and he has not had the opportunity to obtain precious resources for endless years, and he is gnawing at his old roots. Although he built a sect that could collect resources for him, it was still not enough. Therefore, apart from those weapons and treasures, he doesn't have many resources on him, which is also normal!"

Soon, Ye Tian and Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor both allocated the resources on the Jade Dao Ancestor.

Then, Ye Tian took the remnants of the Jade Dao Ancestor and returned to the Hanhai Yellow Tower with the Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor.

After coming back, Ye Tian handed in the task as soon as possible.

The Hanhai Yellow Tower had a connection with other Xuanlou, so after handing in the task, the machine spirit of the Hanhai Yellow Tower directly handed over the remnants of the Jade Dao Ancestor for confirmation.

It didn't take long for the mission to be confirmed.

As a result, Ye Tian was rewarded with 3,000 points at once.

Ye Tian did not regret it, and directly gave Gushan Daozu 300 points, which made Gushan Daozu excited.

"Now I still have 2800 points!"

Among them, 2700 points were earned this time, and 100 points were 100 points given by Jiujulou after becoming an official member.

However, with only 100 points, you can't do much.

But 2800 points is enough, enough for Ye Tian to go to some precious treasure land!

"Now that you have 2800 points, let's go to the Deep Spring Abyss!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Abyss is a treasure trove located in the Black Abyss, an area between the boundaries of two large regions, similar to the Hanhai Wind Belt.

The two regional boundaries were the Ancient Spring District Boundary and the Storm District Boundary, and these two regional boundaries were blocked by the Black Abyss.

And the black abyss is very dangerous, even more dangerous than the Hanhai Wind Belt.

However, there are still many opportunities contained in the black abyss, such as the deep spring abyss is one of the treasures.

The Deep Spring Abyss is completely controlled by the Nine-Story Building, and even if it is an official member of the Nine-Story Building, he can't enter the Deep Spring Abyss without enough points.

For example, the members of the Yellow Mansion need 1,000 points to enter the Deep Spring Abyss once, which is enough to discourage countless Nine-Fold Floor Dao Ancestors.

But the deep spring abyss gave birth to a deep spring liquid, which was able to raise the life level of the half-step sevenfold ancestor.

Of course.

The suppression of the half-step sevenfold ancestor by the deep spring abyss is very large, and the longer it stays, the more terrifying the suppression becomes, and in the end, it will be directly suppressed to the point that the physical body collapses.

Therefore, the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor could not stay in the Deep Spring Abyss for a long time.

Some half-step sevenfold ancestors spent 1,000 points, and after entering the deep spring abyss, they didn't absorb much deep spring liquid, so it was a loss.

Of course, if you absorb enough, you will naturally earn it!

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to apply to go to the Deep Spring Abyss.

Soon, Ye Tian's application was agreed to by Jiuzhulou.

After paying 1,000 points, Hanhai Yellow Tower hooked up with another Xuanlou - Guquan Xuanlou.

In an instant, Ye Tian came to the Ancient Spring Xuanlou, and then through the Ancient Spring Xuanlou, he directly moved to a boundary point at the entrance of the Deep Spring Abyss.

"The Nine-Story Building is too powerful, it came to the Deep Spring Abyss so quickly and easily!" Ye Tian sighed.

Like the other Dao Ancestors in the Hanhai District Boundary, it was extremely difficult to leave the Hanhai District Boundary, let alone reach here, they were afraid that they would not be able to reach here in their lifetime.

Soon, Ye Tian arrived at the Deep Spring Abyss.

At the moment when he had just entered the Deep Spring Abyss, he sensed the existence of a half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

"This half-step sevenfold ancestor ......"

Ye Tian felt the incomparably terrifying breath of life from him, and his cultivation had also reached the limit of a half-step sevenfold ancestor.

"The life level is higher than mine, and it's not a little higher, it's much higher!"

Ye Tian judged.

Perhaps this half-step sevenfold ancestor's life level had already reached above 9.

Along the way, Ye Tian sensed more than one half-step sevenfold ancestor with a high life level, these half-step sevenfold ancestors were all official members of the Nine-Fold Building, and the lowest life level was above 6, but the half-step sevenfold ancestor who was qualified to come here was not inferior to him, or even higher.

The deep spring is large, and there is a flowing gray stream of water in the void.

These gray streams are deep spring liquids, but deep spring liquids have quality requirements, and the outermost ones are the most ordinary deep spring liquids, and the deeper ones are higher quality deep spring liquids.

However.

The deeper you go, the greater the suppression, and the less time you spend.

"Absorb the deep spring liquid on the periphery first, and then go deep into the depths!"

Ye Tian quickly found a place where the deep spring liquid was located, and began to absorb the deep spring liquid to improve his life level.
